meta.title: אם אשכחך
meta.author: שלמה קרליבך
meta.note: Positions re-verified via getBoundingClientRect() pixel measurement against the live Tab4U page. The previous values here were the OLD reversed dense-path output (leftmost chord column mapped to lyric position 0, i.e. the rightmost RTL word) — they were wrong. Ground truth for verse-1 is Am@0, Dm@3, Am@9, C@17, Dm@17, Am@27, Dm@32; the extractor's proportional formula lands Dm on position 22 instead of 17 for that one chord (~1 word off, documented gap in Tab4U's inconsistent column padding).

lines.lyricsContains: אם אשכחך ירושלים תשכח תשכח תשכח ימני
אם לא אעלה את ירושלים על ראש שמחתי
